name: glm-mcp-codex
description: GLM delegation skill and advisory routing hook for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate safe, self-contained work to GLM.
interface.longDescription: A GLM delegation skill and an advisory routing hook. Install the glm-mcp-codex npm package for the MCP runtime and credentials.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the GLM delegate for this well-specified, non-sensitive subtask.
